name: product-in-acquisitions-os
description: An operating system for product leaders running post-acquisition integrations. Walks acquiring-company product leaders through the 90-day framework: Week 0 readiness, roadmap convergence, market positioning stability, and people integration. Calibrated for acquirers up to $5B enterprise value, from sub-$100M ARR well-funded early stage through $100-500M ARR growth stage.
